title: Tarzan and the Amazons
writer: Hans Jacoby, Marjorie L. Pfaelzer, Edgar Rice Burroughs
actors: Johnny Weissmuller, Brenda Joyce, Johnny Sheffield
plot: A group of archaeologists asks Tarzan to help them find an ancient city in a hidden valley of women. He refuses, but Boy is tricked into doing the job. The queen of the women asks Tarzan to help them.
